allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys; print\(sys.version\); import numpy; print\('numpy:', numpy.__version__\)")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 PYTHONLEGACYWINDOWSSTDIO=0 uv run kedro viz run --port 4141 --no-browser)
Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat: implementar pipelines feature_engineering, llm_agents, backtesting y execution' --body ' *)

PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; \(Get-Item "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).FullName; \(Get-Item "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\" -Filter "gh.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Filter "gh.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
